offer: For construction contractors processing 5–15 projects/month, inefficient reporting causes delays in project updates. We automate progress report generation instead of manual reporting processes.
problem: Inefficient reporting from job site data
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about reporting tools
DM outreach to construction contractors with demo video

try_it: Let users try manual data entry and report generation
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing job data
Streamline onboarding process for new users
